Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of the segment starting at First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and ending at SW-Reviewer Agreed, specifically in variants that include a revision cycle (e.g., those containing RW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed compared to the time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that ultimately lead to acceptance versus those leading to rejection or resubmission
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of the phase initiated by First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation until SW-Reviewer Agreed is recorded
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed in cases where reviewer assignment required multiple reminders (e.g., variants containing Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed relative to the time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case trajectory
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include “Awaiting Assignment to Batch” as a subsequent activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
